metadata.title: roda.dev
metadata.description: Gabriel Roda, front-end developer focused on digital education, product, and content.

hero.title: Front-end for learning experiences, product, and digital content.
intro: I am a front-end developer with a strong focus on digital education and product work.
I am always looking to stay current and connected to new trends and technologies.
I build materials, platforms, and digital flows that bring clarity, scale, and care to education-focused projects.

support.title: Interfaces that help people study, produce, and make better decisions.

items.title: Digital education
items.description: Materials, learning paths, responsive reading, and interactions that reduce friction in the learning journey.

items.title: Product with context
items.description: Front-end connected to flow, operations, and the real evolution of a platform, not only to the visual layer.

items.title: Internal tools
items.description: Authoring and production environments designed to bring speed and consistency to content teams.
